Home / Cookie Policy

🍪 Cookie Policy

Creative Kaygency uses cookies to provide a better user experience, track site analytics, and personalise content. This page explains what cookies we use and how to manage them.

Essential Cookies

Essential cookies are required for the website to function properly. These include authentication, security, and user preference cookies.

Analytics Cookies

We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use our site and which pages are most popular. This data helps us improve your experience.

Managing Your Preferences

You can manage your cookie preferences from your browser settings or by contacting us directly.

© 2024-2026 Creative Kaygency. All rights reserved.
